fields.name: Barbell Bench Press
fields.instructions: Lower bar to mid chest and press to full lockout.

fields.name: Incline Bench Press
fields.instructions: Press bar upward on incline bench targeting upper chest.

fields.name: Decline Bench Press
fields.instructions: Press bar from lower chest angle on decline bench.

fields.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
fields.instructions: Use narrow grip to emphasize triceps during press.

fields.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
fields.instructions: Press dumbbells from chest with full range of motion.

fields.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
fields.instructions: Press dumbbells upward on incline bench.

fields.name: Decline Dumbbell Press
fields.instructions: Press dumbbells on decline bench targeting lower chest.

fields.name: Dumbbell Flyes
fields.instructions: Lower dumbbells wide with slight elbow bend and squeeze chest at top.

fields.name: Incline Flyes
fields.instructions: Perform fly movement on incline bench.

fields.name: Chest Press Machine
fields.instructions: Press machine handles forward until arms are extended.

fields.name: Plate-Loaded Chest Press
fields.instructions: Press weight forward in controlled motion.

fields.name: Pec Deck
fields.instructions: Bring arms together in hugging motion squeezing chest.

fields.name: Cable Chest Press
fields.instructions: Press cable handles forward with control.

fields.name: Cable Fly
fields.instructions: Bring cable handles together in arc motion.

fields.name: Push-ups
fields.instructions: Lower body to floor and press back up maintaining straight body line.

fields.name: Dips (Chest-Focused)
fields.instructions: Lean forward while dipping to emphasize chest.

fields.name: Pull-ups
fields.instructions: Pull body upward until chin clears bar.

fields.name: Chin-ups
fields.instructions: Underhand grip pull-up focusing on biceps.

fields.name: Lat Pulldown
fields.instructions: Pull bar to upper chest while squeezing lats.

fields.name: Barbell Row
fields.instructions: Row bar toward lower chest with flat back.

fields.name: Dumbbell Row
fields.instructions: Row dumbbell toward hip while stabilizing torso.

fields.name: Seated Cable Row
fields.instructions: Pull handle toward torso squeezing shoulder blades.

fields.name: T-Bar Row
fields.instructions: Row bar toward chest keeping back neutral.

fields.name: Chest-Supported Row
fields.instructions: Row handles toward torso while chest stays supported.

fields.name: Deadlift
fields.instructions: Lift bar from floor by extending hips and knees.

fields.name: Romanian Deadlift
fields.instructions: Hinge at hips lowering bar along legs maintaining slight knee bend.

fields.name: Rack Pull
fields.instructions: Lift bar from rack height focusing on lockout.

fields.name: Back Extension
fields.instructions: Extend spine from flexed position squeezing lower back.

fields.name: Good Morning
fields.instructions: Hinge forward at hips with bar on back maintaining neutral spine.

fields.name: Overhead Press
fields.instructions: Press bar overhead from shoulder level.

fields.name: Arnold Press
fields.instructions: Rotate palms while pressing dumbbells overhead.

fields.name: Front Raise
fields.instructions: Raise weight straight in front to shoulder height.

fields.name: Lateral Raise
fields.instructions: Raise arms to sides to shoulder height.

fields.name: Upright Row
fields.instructions: Pull bar upward toward chin leading with elbows.

fields.name: Rear Delt Fly
fields.instructions: Raise arms outward while bent over targeting rear delts.

fields.name: Face Pull
fields.instructions: Pull rope toward face keeping elbows high.

fields.name: Reverse Pec Deck
fields.instructions: Pull handles outward targeting rear delts.

fields.name: Barbell Curl
fields.instructions: Curl bar upward keeping elbows fixed.

fields.name: Dumbbell Curl
fields.instructions: Curl dumbbells upward with controlled motion.

fields.name: Hammer Curl
fields.instructions: Curl dumbbells with neutral grip.

fields.name: Preacher Curl
fields.instructions: Curl weight using preacher bench for isolation.

fields.name: Concentration Curl
fields.instructions: Curl dumbbell while seated focusing on peak contraction.

fields.name: Cable Curl
fields.instructions: Curl cable handle upward keeping elbows stationary.

fields.name: EZ Bar Curl
fields.instructions: Curl EZ bar upward with controlled motion.

fields.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
fields.instructions: Perform curls seated on incline bench allowing full stretch.

fields.name: Tricep Pushdown
fields.instructions: Extend elbows fully pushing cable downward.

fields.name: Skull Crushers
fields.instructions: Lower bar toward forehead then extend arms fully.

fields.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
fields.instructions: Lower weight behind head and extend arms overhead.

fields.name: Dips (Tricep-Focused)
fields.instructions: Keep torso upright to emphasize triceps.

fields.name: Cable Kickbacks
fields.instructions: Extend arm backward fully squeezing triceps.

fields.name: Back Squat
fields.instructions: Descend to parallel and drive upward through heels.

fields.name: Front Squat
fields.instructions: Keep torso upright while squatting.

fields.name: Hack Squat
fields.instructions: Lower sled and press upward targeting quads.

fields.name: Leg Press
fields.instructions: Press platform upward extending legs.

fields.name: Leg Extension
fields.instructions: Extend knees fully focusing on quads.

fields.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
fields.instructions: Lower rear-foot elevated squat maintaining balance.

fields.name: Lunges
fields.instructions: Step forward and lower until knees reach 90 degrees.

fields.name: Lying Leg Curl
fields.instructions: Curl heels toward glutes.

fields.name: Seated Leg Curl
fields.instructions: Curl weight downward engaging hamstrings.

fields.name: Nordic Curl
fields.instructions: Lower body forward slowly controlling hamstrings.

fields.name: Hip Thrust
fields.instructions: Drive hips upward squeezing glutes.

fields.name: Glute Bridge
fields.instructions: Raise hips from floor squeezing glutes.

fields.name: Standing Calf Raise
fields.instructions: Raise heels upward fully extending ankles.

fields.name: Seated Calf Raise
fields.instructions: Raise heels while seated targeting soleus.

fields.name: Crunches
fields.instructions: Lift shoulders off floor engaging abs.

fields.name: Sit-ups
fields.instructions: Lift torso fully to seated position.

fields.name: Hanging Leg Raises
fields.instructions: Raise legs while hanging from bar.

fields.name: Plank
fields.instructions: Hold forearm plank maintaining neutral spine.

fields.name: Russian Twists
fields.instructions: Rotate torso side to side engaging obliques.

fields.name: Treadmill Running
fields.instructions: Run at steady pace or intervals.

fields.name: Incline Walking
fields.instructions: Walk at incline for increased intensity.

fields.name: Stairmaster
fields.instructions: Climb stairs continuously at set resistance.

fields.name: Rowing Machine
fields.instructions: Row with full body extension and contraction.

fields.name: Cycling
fields.instructions: Pedal continuously maintaining cadence.

fields.name: Jump Rope
fields.instructions: Jump continuously rotating rope under feet.

fields.name: Sled Push
fields.instructions: Drive sled forward with powerful strides.

fields.name: Kettlebell Swings
fields.instructions: Hinge hips explosively swinging kettlebell to chest height.

fields.name: Battle Ropes
fields.instructions: Create waves with ropes using full body power.

fields.name: Farmer's Carries
fields.instructions: Walk while holding heavy weights at sides.

fields.name: Box Jumps
fields.instructions: Jump explosively onto box landing softly.

fields.name: Medicine Ball Slams
fields.instructions: Lift ball overhead and slam to ground forcefully.

fields.name: Agility Ladder
fields.instructions: Perform quick foot drills through ladder.

fields.name: Sprints
fields.instructions: Run short distances at maximum speed.

fields.name: Standing Quad Stretch
fields.instructions: Stand on one foot and pull the opposite ankle toward your glutes. Keep knees together and hold for 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Kneeling Hip Flexor Stretch
fields.instructions: Kneel on one knee with the other foot forward. Shift hips forward gently until a stretch is felt in the front of the rear hip. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Seated Hamstring Stretch
fields.instructions: Sit on the floor with legs straight. Hinge at the hips and reach toward your toes. Keep your back flat. Hold 30 seconds.

fields.name: Lying Glute Stretch (Figure-4)
fields.instructions: Lie on your back and cross one ankle over the opposite knee. Pull the uncrossed leg toward your chest until a stretch is felt in the glute. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Pigeon Pose
fields.instructions: From a plank, bring one knee forward and let the shin rest on the floor at an angle. Lower hips toward the ground and hold for 45 seconds each side.

fields.name: Standing Calf Stretch
fields.instructions: Stand facing a wall. Place one foot back with heel flat on the floor. Lean forward until a stretch is felt in the calf. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Adductor Butterfly Stretch
fields.instructions: Sit with the soles of your feet together and knees out to the sides. Gently press knees toward the floor and lean forward. Hold 30 seconds.

fields.name: Wide-Leg Forward Fold
fields.instructions: Stand with feet wide apart. Hinge at the hips and lower your torso toward the floor, letting the arms hang or rest on the ground. Hold 30 seconds.

fields.name: 90/90 Hip Stretch
fields.instructions: Sit with both legs bent at 90 degrees, one in front and one to the side. Stay tall through the spine and hold 30 seconds, then switch sides.

fields.name: Frog Stretch
fields.instructions: On hands and knees, widen your knees as far as comfortable with feet in line with knees. Shift hips back gently. Hold 45 seconds.

fields.name: Child's Pose
fields.instructions: Kneel on the floor, sit back on your heels, and extend arms forward on the floor. Let your chest sink toward the ground. Hold 45 seconds.

fields.name: Cat-Cow
fields.instructions: On hands and knees, alternate between arching your back upward (cat) and letting it sag downward (cow). Move slowly with your breath for 10 repetitions.

fields.name: Seated Spinal Twist
fields.instructions: Sit tall with legs extended. Cross one foot over the opposite knee and rotate your torso toward the bent knee. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Supine Knee-to-Chest
fields.instructions: Lie on your back and pull both knees toward your chest. Rock gently side to side. Hold 30 seconds.

fields.name: Thoracic Extension on Foam Roller
fields.instructions: Place a foam roller horizontally under your mid-back. Support your head with your hands and gently extend over the roller. Hold 30 seconds and reposition up the spine.

fields.name: Cross-Body Shoulder Stretch
fields.instructions: Bring one arm across your chest and press it gently with the opposite arm. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Doorway Chest Stretch
fields.instructions: Stand in a doorway with arms at 90 degrees on the frame. Step one foot forward and lean gently through the doorway. Hold 30 seconds.

fields.name: Sleeper Stretch
fields.instructions: Lie on your side with your bottom arm at 90 degrees. Use the top hand to gently press the bottom wrist toward the floor. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Overhead Tricep Stretch
fields.instructions: Raise one arm overhead and bend the elbow so the hand reaches behind your head. Use the opposite hand to press the elbow gently. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Shoulder Pendulum Stretch
fields.instructions: Lean forward with one hand supported on a surface. Let the opposite arm hang freely and make small circles. Perform for 30 seconds each direction.

fields.name: Eagle Arm Stretch
fields.instructions: Cross one arm under the other at the elbow and wrap the forearms together. Lift elbows slightly and hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Neck Side Tilt
fields.instructions: Sit tall and tilt your head toward one shoulder. Optionally use the same-side hand to add gentle pressure. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Chin Tuck
fields.instructions: Stand or sit tall and gently draw your chin straight back, creating a double-chin effect. Hold 5 seconds and repeat 10 times.

fields.name: Upper Trap Stretch
fields.instructions: Sit tall and reach one hand behind your back. Tilt your head away and forward until you feel a stretch along the top of the shoulder. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Levator Scapulae Stretch
fields.instructions: Turn your head 45 degrees to one side and tilt your chin toward your armpit. Use the same-side hand to add gentle downward pressure on your head. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Bicep Wall Stretch
fields.instructions: Stand beside a wall and place one palm flat against it at shoulder height. Slowly rotate your body away until a stretch is felt in the bicep. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch
fields.instructions: Extend one arm forward with palm facing up. Use the opposite hand to gently pull the fingers down toward the floor. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Wrist Extensor Stretch
fields.instructions: Extend one arm forward with palm facing down. Use the opposite hand to gently press the back of the hand down and toward you. Hold 30 seconds each side.

fields.name: Prayer Stretch
fields.instructions: Place palms together in front of your chest in prayer position. Slowly lower the hands toward your waist while keeping palms together until you feel a stretch in the forearms. Hold 30 seconds.

fields.name: Pronator/Supinator Stretch
fields.instructions: Extend one arm forward. Slowly rotate the forearm palm-up then palm-down through its full range. Pause at end range for 5 seconds. Perform 10 slow rotations each arm.
